scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.dev:server: sh -ac '. ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; PORT=${PORT:-5000}; : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL must be set in environment or .env}"; export PORT DATABASE_URL; pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev'
scripts.dev:web: sh -ac '. ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; PORT=${PORT:-3000}; BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/}; export PORT BASE_PATH; pnpm --filter @workspace/dil-ogrenme run dev'
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:web
scripts.seed:community: sh -ac '. ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL must be set in environment or .env}"; export DATABASE_URL; pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run seed:community'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
